notes: New: Extensions store (Ad Blocker, Typing Sounds, Dark Mode, Smooth Scroll, Reader Mode). New: Downloads panel in navbar. New: Private/Incognito tabs. New: Layout settings (left sidebar tabs, compact mode). New: Smart bookmark star (one-click add/remove). Fix: Ctrl+click opens links in new tab. Fix: Auto-updater now works correctly for portable exe. More keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Shift+T reopen tab, Ctrl+Shift+N incognito, Ctrl+D bookmark, Alt+Left/Right navigate, Ctrl+Tab switch tabs).
